title: C94 · Separation Principle in a Second Substrate

story.text:
# 💡 C94 · Separation Principle in a Second Substrate
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The PVM Separation Principle (s ⊥ m | X) realised as a running build on Archon did:cid — the model holds independent of its stones. A second-forge realisation strengthens the abstract convergence case (C34–C37). Active (~55% · Tome X). Edges → C39, C7.

## Edges out

- *extends* → [[C39 · Cousin-Blade as Ecosystem Primitive]]

## Edges in

- [[Tome X Act 1: The House of Archon Answers]] *introduces* →
- [[C96 · Control-Plane ⊥ Data-Plane]] *extends* →
